title: Contract Business Processing Officer (Commercial Bank)
description:
Responsibilities:
The business processing officer for Clearing Settlement Team (Commercial Bank) will handle the payment clearing for the commercial bank business of the bank. The main responsibilities include but not limited to:

  • Responsible for all sending/receiving/transferring of remittance and swift messages in Commercial Bank.
  • To process customer's remittance application form submitted by Retail Banking (Branch), Remittance Team and other relevant departments.
  • To process enquiry cases and also responsible to oversee cases that has been transferred to other departments and/or branch and make sure that they are attended promptly.
  • Responsible for daily download/upload/archive of files and reports in G3 platform.  
  • Responsible for assisting yearly routine testing of MEPS+ and G3 platform.
  • Responsible for registering and filing local GIRO agreement.
  • Responsible to maintain of Reciprocal Mutual Agreement (RMA) and PayNow agreement as instructed.
  • Responsible for end day monitoring of balance of internal accounts.
  • Coordinate with other business department on regular basis to optimize the internal system and procedure and perform the testing.
  • Assist in other responsibilities demanded by Department Head or Deputy Head or Team Leader.

Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree or above, preferably in Banking and Finance
  • Sufficient knowledge and experience on SWIFT, MEPS+, IBG, Fast and PayNow
  • Good knowledge of Account Entry
  • Proficient PC skills such as MS Office Suite
  • Willing to learn attitude, proactive, self-initiative
  • Able to cope with stress in a fast-paced working environment
  • Strictly comply with company’s rules and regulations

postedCompany.description:
HR-PRO RECRUITMENT SERVICES PTE LTD. (EA LICENCE NO.: 03C3916)

HR-Pro is a home grown recruitment agency dedicated to achieving the perfect match between employers and employees. We are committed to provide excellent service in helping our clients in all aspects of permanent, contract and temporary placement. We specialize in the recruitment of clerical, executive and managerial positions in the commerical and financial sector. Our strength lies with a group of well-trained, dynamic and experienced consultants who ensure your recruitment needs are well taken care of within the shortest possible period of time. Restfully assured that you are in good, experienced hands with our friendly consultants. Being a market sensitive establishment, HR-Pro is familiar with the ever-changing market trends in both recruitment industry as well as the financial and commercial sector. Hence, this provides us with an advantage over our competitors in providing accurate and up to date personnel information.
